documentation:
AlarmOffset changes regsiter for Trans Temp, Hi Trans Temp HH, and SPD Surge alarms from 40005 to 40006
Output PF has been shown to work with either 31092 or 31091. Utilize the registerOutputPF to update
Not all versions have kWh - utilize hasInputkWh and hasOutputkWh to enable/disable
name: Maverick_Modbus_v3
